description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.5 Docker image and a global before_script that runs `pip install -r requirements.txt`. Define build and test stages. In the build stage add check_week_4_additional (allow_failure true) and check_week_4_mandatory (allow_failure false) that run `test -e week_4/week4a.py` and `test -e week_4/week4.py && test -e week_4/test_week4.py && test -e week_4/m1facade.txt` respectively, both triggered only on branches matching `/^lab[-_].*4$/` and excluded from master and the CSUI-AdvProg-2017/lab-exercises project, and also add prep_week_3, prep_week_4, prep_week_5, prep_week_6, prep_week_7, prep_week_8 jobs that run flake8 and file existence checks on their respective week directories, each limited to a branch named exactly `week-3`, `week-4`, `week-5`, `week-6`, `week-7` or `week_8`. In the test stage add grade_week_1_additional (allow_failure true) and grade_week_1_mandatory (allow_failure false) with scripts `file week_1/form_a1.py && python week_1/form_a1.py` and `file week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py && python week_1/form_m{1,2,3}.py` triggered only on `/^lab[-_].*1$/`, similarly grade_week_2_* (run python scripts in week_2 patterns), grade_week_3_* (run file and python on week_3 files), grade_week_4_* (run python, cat and `python -m unittest discover week_4`), grade_week_5_* (run unittest modules in week_5), grade_week_6_* (run python on observer files), and grade_week_7_* (run cat and python on week_7 files), each with appropriate allow_failure flags, only on matching `/^lab[-_].*X$/` patterns and excluded from master and the lab-exercises project. No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
